---
title: "Phylogenetic Analysis of Hantavirus Andes MV Hondius Cruise Outbreak in April - May 2026"
date: 13/05/2026
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the R Code"
    self-contained: true
---

# Phylogenetic placement across Orthohantavirus taxa

```{r}
#| label: fig-diverse-hanta
#| fig-cap: "Phylogenetic placement of Outbreak Strain Within Hantavirus Taxonomy"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-height: 20
#| fig-width: 12

library(here)

source(here("scripts", "hantavirus_diverse_species_phylogeny.R"))

p

```



# Consistency of placement across various placements

```{r}

#source("scripts/S_M_L_andes_phylogenetic_consistency.R")


```

```{r}

#source("scripts/outbreak_lineage_snp_analysis.R")


```
